title: Multi-Source Sentiment Scoring Pipeline (Claude + FinBERT + Regression)
summary: Structured sentiment from Yahoo RSS + Finviz scored via three methods: (1) zero-shot Claude direct prompt (no chain-of-thought for latency), (2) local FinBERT headline scorer as a cross-check, (3) regression-calibrated composite. Add as 10th signal dimension. SAPPO research shows Sharpe improvement when sentiment is combined with technical signals.
research_topic: Win Rate Improvement — New Feature Research
